description.ko: 거대 블랙홀이 라벤더색 성운을 삼키는 경외로운 광경을 통해 우주 심연의 고요한 위엄을 보여줍니다.
description.en: An awe-inspiring view of a supermassive black hole consuming a lavender nebula, showcasing the silent majesty of the cosmic abyss.

prompt: A cinematic 8k render of VOID-3, titled 'The Nebula’s Requiem.' A massive swirling vortex of #0D0221 obsidian dark matter pulling gossamer-thin #7B68EE lavender nebula tendrils into a gravitational singularity. Distant #E6E6FA soft lavender star clusters flicker through thick cosmic dust, distorted by extreme gravitational lensing. The core of the singularity emits a faint, haunting violet glow that illuminates the surrounding #3D1A78 deep space clouds. Atmosphere of infinite scale and silent majesty, hyper-realistic space photography aesthetic, volumetric lighting, and terrifying cosmic beauty.
